title: USB-C power sink benchmark fixture
representative_intent: USB-C 5V/3A sink with CC resistors, fuse, and regulator

requirements.text: Represent USB-C sink CC1/CC2 pull-down evidence for default 5 V power negotiation.
Provide VBUS input protection evidence including fuse/current-limit and transient protection review hooks.
Track 5 V sink current budget and high-current copper-width/current-density review evidence.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, rail current, regulator margin, current-density, and SI/PI review evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not USB-IF certification or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim USB-C compliance, PD negotiation correctness, safety certification, manufacturability, or production readiness.
